steps.t: Greenfield spiderlings can be found in Scary and its quarry. Hoping to make some of the cotton-webbed bushes at Wistmead more convincing, Iris Tunnell…
Iris Tunnelly can be found in Wistmead. You have gathered a number of spiderlings in Scary and you should now return to Iris Tunnelly.
Curiously empty webbing can be found on bushes throughout Wistmead. Iris Tunnelly has asked you to put the spiderlings you found into a few of the web…
Iris Tunnelly can be found in Wistmead. You have filled several webbed bushes with spiders. You should now return to Iris Tunnelly.
